decision_memo.recommended_action: Launch the first Mexico-first acquisition experiment on the best-fit channel.
decision_memo.decision_summary: Improve conversion quality for founder-led service sales
key_risks: Execution may still fail if the offer is not explained with enough specificity.
Channel assumptions should be validated with early conversion data.
next_steps: Launch the first Mexico-first acquisition experiment on the best-fit channel.
Test the target pricing tier with explicit scope and proof.
Measure conversion quality, not just lead volume, for 30 days.
